title: Romantic & Allegiant Wedding
description: A beautiful celebration of love overlooking the Indian Ocean. This intimate wedding captured the essence of romance with golden hour portraits and candid moments.

title: Garden Romance
description: Surrounded by lush gardens and traditional elegance, this wedding was a perfect blend of cultural heritage and modern romance.

title: Beachside Bliss
description: Waves, sand, and endless love. This beachside ceremony captured the wild and free spirit of a couple deeply in love.

title: Mountain Majesty
description: High in the misty mountains, this couple exchanged vows surrounded by tea plantations and rolling hills.

title: Heritage & Heart
description: A grand celebration honoring tradition while embracing contemporary love. Every moment was filled with joy and cultural richness.

title: Sunset Serenade
description: As the sun dipped into the ocean, two souls became one. This magical evening was painted in hues of gold and orange.
